subcodes.first_line: O Zuhuri! In the realm of eloquence and rhetoric thou hast, in truth, shown forth a manifest radiance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ظهوری در میدان فصاحت و بلاغت فی الحقیقه ظهور و بروزی نمودی
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @poems and quotation from poetry, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @personal instructions
